column1: # WISER georeference survey — one row per surveyed pole dwell.
# Fit into the WISER-inch -> field-cm transform by: python scripts/georeference_wiser.py
#                (poles A0..C4; temp markers M1..M6/N1..N6; shelter corners <shelter>_XhiYlo etc.)
#   shortid      WISER tag id (decimal) used for the survey dwell
#   wiser_x      OPTIONAL manual WISER-inch x reading; if wiser_x AND wiser_y are given
#   wiser_y      OPTIONAL manual WISER-inch y reading; the DB window is NOT read for that row.
# Protocol: dwell the tag STATIONARY ~3-5 min at each pole (hundreds of fixes -> the median
# averages the ~7 in jitter down). Use >= 6 WELL-DISTRIBUTED poles (mix interior + edge

column2: C4) so noisy edge/corner reads can't dominate the fit.
